purpose: Receive tool-call requests from CLI, gate through permissions and hooks, execute, and return results

activities.title: Receive Tool Call Request
activities.description: CLI sends external_tool.requested or tool execution RPC to SDK with toolName + args + invocation context

activities.title: Invoke Pre-Tool-Use Hook
activities.description: Fire onPreToolUse hook; allows modifiedArgs, permissionDecision override, additionalContext injection, or suppression

activities.title: Gate Through Permission Handler
activities.description: Call permissionHandler(request); decision = approve-once | approve-always | deny-once | deny-always | ask

activities.title: Resolve Tool Handler
activities.description: Look up registered toolHandler by name; check overridesBuiltInTool flag; fall through to CLI built-in if not registered

activities.title: Execute Tool Handler
activities.description: Invoke handler(args, invocation) -> ToolResult; handle timeout, errors, binary results

activities.title: Invoke Post-Tool-Use Hook
activities.description: Fire onPostToolUse hook with toolResult; allows modifiedResult, additionalContext, suppressOutput

activities.title: Return Tool Result to CLI
activities.description: Send ToolResultObject back via RPC; includes textResultForLlm, resultType, optional binaryResultsForLlm
